case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC VS. FATAI ADEWUSI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OPPOSITION THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $615. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES:

PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted and For Sanctions is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an opposition the Court adopts its Tentative Ruling.

The Motion is GRANTED. The Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $615. Moving party to submit a proposed Order for the Court's signature.

Judge Pro-tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
